title: Brewing Helper
description: Brewing Helper is a Client-sided Fabric mod which helps the player brew.
body:
Brewing Helper

Brewing Helper is a Client-sided Fabric mod which helps the player brew.

This mod supports ALL Languages that Minecraft has!

Brewing Helper Adds:

Extra Tooltips to all Brewing Ingredients, So that You know which Effect the Ingredient will give.

  • Gold: Default Effect When applied to an Awkward potion .
  • Purple: What the Effect will Change to when using a Fermented spider eye.
  • Red: What Changes when Applied to a Potion with Effects.
  • Green: Type of Potion you will get when Adding to a Water bottle. (Dragon's breath and Gunpowder can be Applied to all Potion types.)

Extra Creative Menu page.

  • This page has all the Essential Items when Brewing.
